nodes.name: 西北欧
nodes.summary: 西北欧是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括紅髮，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 紅髮
nodes.summary: 紅髮（Red hair），主要分布于西北欧。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Woman with red hair thumb|Actor Rupert Grint with red hair thumb|Woman with red hair Red hair, also known as ginger hair, is a human hair color found in 2–6% of people of Northwestern European ancestry, typically those of Celtic ancestry, and smaller amounts in other populations
